planningAreas.name: CCHS (HOUSING SOLUTIONS)
planningAreas.val: Not in CCHS — RS-1-7 residential zone is not CCHS-eligible. Source: SDMC §143.0710 (2026-04-15).

planningAreas.name: TRANSIT PRIORITY AREA (TPA)
planningAreas.val: Not in TPA — Serra Mesa interior residential; no high-frequency transit within 0.5 mi. Source: MTS route map; SDMTS.com (2026-04-15).

planningAreas.name: PARKING STANDARDS (PSTPA)
planningAreas.val: Not in PSTPA — no TPA designation; standard RS-1-7 parking (2 spaces per unit). Source: SDMC §142.0528 (2026-04-15).

planningAreas.name: MOBILITY CHOICES
planningAreas.val: -- TBD: SD Municipal Code Appendix A Fig A-1

overlayZones.name: TRANSIT AREA OVERLAY
overlayZones.val: No — Serra Mesa interior residential; no TAOZ designation per SD Zoning Map. Source: SD Zoning Data Portal (2026-04-15).

overlayZones.name: AIRPORT INFLUENCE AREA
overlayZones.val: YES — Montgomery Field (MYF) ALUCP Review Area 1 (~55-60 CNEL). Site at 32.800°N is ~1.3 mi south of MYF runway 28L/10R. Noise attenuation required for new residential per SDMC §132.0403 Airport Overlay Zone. Verify exact contour via SDMC Appendix F Fig 132-03G or SDCRAA APN lookup. Source: MYF ALUCP; SDMC §132.0403 (2026-04-15).

overlayZones.name: VERY HIGH FIRE HAZARD
overlayZones.val: Likely No — Serra Mesa is a fully developed mid-city neighborhood; no SRA or LRA designation expected. Verify via SD ZAPP portal or CAL FIRE FHSZ map (2025 update). Source: CAL FIRE FHSZ viewer 2025 (2026-04-15).

overlayZones.name: FAULT ZONE
overlayZones.val: Likely No — Serra Mesa is ~1.5 mi north of Mission Valley (Rose Canyon Fault trace). AP fault zone boundary is narrow (~50 ft of fault trace) and does not extend to this location. SEISMIC HAZARD still applies (Rose Canyon Fault M6.9 max, ~1.5 mi; Geotech required per SDMC §113.0271). Source: CGS AP Zone GIS; SDMC §132.0105 (2026-04-15).
